name: Club de Nuit Intense Man EDT - Armaf
description: Club de Nuit Intense Man by Armaf is a provocative woody spicy fragrance for men. Highly acclaimed for its intense, fresh lemon-apple-pineapple opening drying down into a premium smoky birch wood and patchouli aroma.

name: Lattafa Khamrah EDP
description: Khamrah by Lattafa Perfumes is a luxurious Amber Vanilla warm spicy fragrance. It wraps sweetness with oriental warmth featuring heavy spices, dates, vanilla, and sweet praline.
features: Exquisite heavy glass bottle display structure

name: Rasasi Hawas for Him EDP
description: Rasasi Hawas for Him blends cinnamon, bergamot, orange blossom, grey amber and sandalwood to create an aquatic fragrance designed to embody masculine strength and vigor.

name: Fogg Body Spray Marco
description: Fogg Body Spray Marco is a premium deodorant body spray designed for individuals seeking a fresh, masculine, and long-lasting fragrance. It combines aromatic and woody notes, delivering a sophisticated scent that keeps you confident throughout the day. With a no-gas formula, this body spray provides maximum usage and better fragrance coverage.
features: Long-Lasting Fragrance: Keeps you fresh and fragrant all day.

name: Blue Lady 40 ml perfume
description: Very sweet floral bouquet with citrus notes and fruity touches. The fruity notes gives freshness and diffusion. The accord finishes with a soft musky effect and a lasting woody base. Very feminine with a sensual touch. This floral fragrance stays fresh always.
features: Very sweet floral bouquet with citrus notes and fruity touches.
